description.zh-Hans: 通过镜像象限或八分区域创建完美可平铺的对称图案。适用于具有双边对称性的建筑立面。
description.en: Creates perfectly tileable symmetric patterns by mirroring quadrants or eighths. Useful for building facades with bilateral symmetry.

triggers.zh-Hans: 瓦片镜像, 对称平铺, 镜像平铺, 四分镜像, 棋盘镜像
triggers.en: tile mirror, symmetric tiling, mirror tile, quadrant mirror

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 应用四分之一镜像对称，从单个象限创建完美平铺的建筑立面。
exampleUsage.en: Apply quadrant mirror symmetry to create a perfectly tileable building facade from a single quadrant.
